ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - Flight 7890
ham.body:
Dear Jane Doe,

Thank you for booking your flight with SkyHigh Airways. Below are the details of your upcoming trip:

• Flight Number: SH7890
• Departure: New York (JFK) – 08:45 AM, June 12, 2026
• Arrival: Los Angeles (LAX) – 11:15 AM, June 12, 2026
• Seat: 12A (Window)
• Baggage Allowance: 1 checked bag (max 23 kg) and 1 carry‑on

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. For any changes or to add extra services, visit <URL> or contact our support at +1 800-555-0199.

We look forward to serving you and wish you a pleasant flight.

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airways Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Claim Your $50,000 University Scholarship Now!
spam.body:
Dear Dr. Smith,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected as a recipient for the prestigious Global Leadership Scholarship Program offered by the International Institute of Advanced Studies. Your application, submitted on March 2, 2026, has been reviewed and approved.

To secure your scholarship, you must complete the following verification steps within the next 48 hours:

1. Verify your identity by providing a scanned copy of your passport, driver's license, or national ID.
2. Submit proof of enrollment for the upcoming academic term (e.g., registration confirmation, student ID, or official transcript).
3. Confirm your bank account details to receive the scholarship funds directly (minimum balance of $5,000).

Please click <URL> to access the secure verification portal and proceed with the next steps. Failure to complete the verification will result in the scholarship being re‑allocated to another candidate.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and look forward to welcoming you to our distinguished community.

Sincerely,
Dr. Emily Carter
Director of Scholarship Services
International Institute of Advanced Studies
Phone: +1 555-987-6543
Email: <Email>
